surfaces.README.md:
# Keelplane

Keelplane uses DWM Core while preserving dynamic-workflow-designer compatibility.
surfaces.docs/dwm-branding.md:
# Keelplane Branding

Keelplane is the public product brand.
DWM Core stands for Deterministic Workflow Machine.
The compatibility skill name remains dynamic-workflow-designer.
The repository slug remains `dwm`.
Do not claim autonomous execution.
